title: quassia insignis
intro: Quassia insignis, also known as the Yellow Quassia or Yellow Quassia Tree, is a species of tree in the family Rutaceae. It is native to the Caribbean and is used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a natural insecticide and antiseptic. The bark and roots of the Quassia insignis tree have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, offering health benefits such as reduced pain and improved wound healing. Herbal preparations of Quassia insignis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune system.
